# Stage-0 provenance — vendored udon-core snapshot

Per the ratified stage-0 policy (rust/PROGRESS.md): libdescent's front-end is
udon-core, whose parser.rs was generated by **Ruby descent** — this vendored
snapshot is the bootstrap stage-0, rustc-style. descent must build standalone
on any clone, so the committed default build uses this copy, never a path-dep
into ~/src/udon.

## Snapshot

- Source repo: ~/src/udon (github: udon), commit `d0bc9f9090a2c318853e589282327708c7d44bcb`
  (2026-07-11 16:45:27 -0600), working tree clean at copy time.
- Files copied verbatim from `core/udon-core/src/`: lib.rs, parser.rs, span.rs, tree.rs.
- sha256 at copy time:
  - parser.rs `a19d0bc486d126769ed15b1254e063e772fde9dce246d75c78997268024cdef3`
  - generated from `core/generator/udon.desc` `f0a92185…` + `values.desc` `246d9d5e…`
    (concatenated by `core/regenerate-parser`, Ruby descent @ 3f81c3c, target: rust).
- Regeneration cross-check at bump time: libdescent (`descent-rs generate`,
  minijinja templates) reproduces this parser.rs **byte-identically** from the
  same concatenated grammars (rust/PROGRESS.md session 4).
- Prior snapshot: udon `17bba19f` / parser.rs `4daacd11…` (pre U1-defect-sweep;
  superseded by the three codegen fixes in descent 3f81c3c).
- Cargo.toml here is NOT from upstream (upstream uses workspace inheritance);
  it pins the same deps: unicode-xid 0.2, memchr 2.7, phf 0.11 (macros).
- Known upstream quirk carried verbatim: `unreachable_patterns` warnings in
  parser.rs (~L3949) — a Ruby-descent case-overlap defect already in the
  improvements ledger; silenced crate-wide via workspace lint config, not by
  editing the generated file.

## Bumping stage-0 (deliberate act, never incidental)

1. Confirm ~/src/udon working tree clean; note its commit SHA.
2. Re-copy the four src files; update SHAs + date above.
3. Run the front-end differential (rust/tools/diff_reader.sh) and, once the
   emitter exists, the regeneration-stability check
   (regenerate -> rebuild -> regenerate must be a fixed point).
4. Commit as its own commit: "bump stage-0 to udon-core @ <sha>".

## Local-dev convenience (optional, non-default)

To iterate against a live udon-core tree, temporarily point the workspace at
it (e.g. `[patch."*"]`-style path override or editing the path in
spikes/udon-reader/Cargo.toml). Never commit such an override.
